rules.name: Age-group conflict
rules.requiredAction: Reopen age, role, structure, production and visual-integrity Gates.

rules.name: Program-type conflict
rules.requiredAction: Revalidate movement, role, structure, Material DNA and production suitability.

rules.name: Movement-amplitude conflict
rules.requiredAction: Perform movement and safety review; escalate if core structure must change.

rules.name: Material DNA conflict
rules.requiredAction: Reopen Material DNA and every dependent production and visual Gate.

rules.name: Cloud Collar core conflict
rules.requiredAction: Reopen Cloud Collar, Base Garment compatibility, priority and production checks.

rules.name: Unauthorized Cloud Collar mix
rules.requiredAction: Stop reuse; select an authorized Phase 1 combination or reopen affected Gates.

rules.name: Production constraint conflict
rules.requiredAction: Production authority must resolve feasibility; any structural substitution triggers full Gate revalidation.

rules.name: Base Garment conflict
rules.requiredAction: Stop all structural inheritance and reopen Base Garment and dependent Gates.

rules.name: Team identity conflict
rules.requiredAction: Reopen palette, composition, priority and visual-integrity Gates.
